layout.sidebar: Left-aligned, 240px to 280px width, deep background (--background), 1px right border (--border).
layout.content_area: Maximum height utilization (h-screen), dense grid padding (p-6 or p-8), strictly aligned internal grid items.
layout.spacing_scale: Standard Tailwind + generous padding inside cards (p-4 to p-6)
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders strategy. Flat cards with 1px border. No shadows. Extreme high contrast.

components.buttons: Square or minimal radius (rounded-sm). Primary: Solid Cobalt Blue. Secondary: Transparent with 1px gray border. Hover states must increase background lightness slightly.
components.cards: Flat background (--card), 1px border (--border). No shadow. Internal padding p-6. Hover effect: slight border brighten to neutral-600.
components.inputs: Flat, 1px border. Background neutral-900. Focus state: ring-1 ring-primary border-primary.
components.tables: Dense. Header rows with mono_label typography. 1px bottom borders for rows. Zebra striping optional but hover states mandatory on rows.

chat_bubbles.user: Right-aligned, max-w-[80%], bg-neutral-900 border border-border rounded-lg p-4. Text left-aligned.
chat_bubbles.agent: Left-aligned, max-w-[80%], bg-transparent rounded-lg p-4. Text left-aligned. Markdown support inside.

components.tool_call_traces: LangSmith style. Collapsible vertical timeline. Left border indicates status (Green/Red). Header contains GET/POST in monospace tag (e.g. bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 text-xs px-2 py-1). Nested JSON viewer inside using JetBrains Mono with syntax coloring (keys in white, strings in green, numbers in amber).

login_background.description: Steel framework cabinets housing servers networking devices and cables in contemporary equipped data center
login_background.usage: Use as a full-page cinematic background for the Auth/Login screen with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/80).

dashboard_splash.description: Yellow and green cables neatly connected in a dark environment
dashboard_splash.usage: Can be used as a subtle texture in empty states or welcome banners.

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle border color shifts (e.g., border-neutral-800 to border-neutral-600).
micro_interactions.loading: ASCII or Monospace text loader (e.g., [ ===    ] 40%) instead of generic spinners for a technical vibe.

accessibility.data_testid: Mandatory on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, list items).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts: IBM Plex Sans (Weights: 400, 500, 600) and JetBrains Mono (Weights: 400, 500).
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, technical iconography.
Configure Tailwind with the provided CSS variables.
Do NOT use arbitrary card shadows; stick to the flat 'Grid Borders' approach (1px border).
For the tool execution traces, build a recursive collapsible tree component using JetBrains Mono.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added strictly as requested.
